windows.summary_v2: A step-number animation bookends a shot of an amber glass measuring cup heaped with white wax flakes being measured out.

tags_v2.setting: white tabletop with step-number title cards

seconds_v2.desc: A faint animated step number '6' fades on a plain grey background as the clip transitions between steps.
An amber-tinted glass measuring cup filled with heaped white wax flakes, captioned 'Measure out your wax flakes.'
The gold glass measuring cup holds a mound of white wax flakes, ml markings visible on its side.
Same measuring cup brimming with flaked white wax, shown on a white surface for measuring.
The amber glass cup of white wax flakes, slightly closer, the heaped flakes filling it to the rim.
The scene fades to grey and a faint animated step number '7' begins to appear.
A bold blue animated number '7' graphic is centered on the plain grey transition background.
The blue '7' fades out to a near-blank grey screen ending the step transition.

windows.old_description: step 7: wax cup in double boiler pot
windows.embed_text_v2: melting wax in a double boiler, amber glass measuring cup of white wax flakes set inside a stainless steel pot of water on a stove, turning the stove knob to low medium heat
windows.summary_v2: A glass cup of white wax flakes is set up in a stainless-steel double boiler on a stove and the burner knob is turned to low-medium heat to begin melting.

tags_v2.action: setting up double boiler to melt wax
tags_v2.on_screen_text: Make a double boiler to melt the wax / 8 / Turn the stove to a low to medium heat

seconds_v2.desc: An amber glass measuring cup of white wax flakes sits inside a stainless steel pot of water on a stove, captioned 'Make a double boiler to melt the wax'.
The double-boiler setup holds steady, the gold glass cup of unmelted white wax flakes resting in the metal pot.
Same double boiler, the white wax flakes still solid in the amber cup set in the steel pan of water.
The glass measuring cup of wax flakes sits in the simmering-water pot, ready to begin melting.
The scene fades to grey and a faint animated step number '8' starts to appear.
A bold blue animated number '8' graphic is centered on the plain grey transition background.
The blue '8' fades to a nearly blank grey screen between steps.
Close-up of a white stove control knob being set, captioned 'Turn the stove to a low to medium heat'.
